subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Isfandiyar, son of Gushtasp, is deserving of boundless reward, and Shirin, daughter of Jamshid, is in need of radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار اسفندیار گشتاسب شایان اجر بی پایانست و شیرین جمشید محتاج پرتو
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
